citation.article_title: Versatile genome assembly evaluation with QUAST-LG
citation.author: Mikheenko

citation.article_title: The nf-core framework for community-curated bioinformatics pipelines

citation.author: P Di Tommaso

citation.article_title: Benchmark datasets for phylogenomic pipeline validation, applications for foodborne pathogen surveillance

citation.article_title: Evaluation of the accuracy of bacterial genome reconstruction with oxford nanopore R10.4.1 long-read-only sequencing
citation.author: N D Sanderson

Evaluation of the accuracy of bacterial genome reconstruction with oxford nanopore R10.4.1 long-read-only sequencing [Journal Article]. Microbial Genomics, 10(5). https://doi.org/10.1099/mgen.0.001246

citation.article_title: An evolution of nanopore next-generation sequencing technology: Implications for medical microbiology and public health

citation.author: P Gerner-Smidt
